title: Data Object Schema
description: Schema for Data objects representing atomic units of research evidence and findings

id.description: Unique identifier for this data point

data_type.description: Type of data (quote, observation, metric, finding, etc.)

content.description: The actual data content (quote text, observation notes, metric value, etc.)

source_session_id.description: ID of the Session that generated this data

timestamp_in.description: Start time or location within source session

timestamp_out.description: End time or location within source session

participant_id.description: Identifier of participant who provided this data

researcher_notes.description: Additional notes or context from the researcher

confidence_level.description: Researcher's confidence in this data point

data_tags.description: Tags specific to this data point for categorization

report_id.description: ID of the Report/DataSet collection this data belongs to

transcript_id.description: ID of the Transcript collection this data belongs to

tags.description: System-derived tags from DUX scan (not manually added)
